pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + Brotli — 1.1123 BPB (seed 314, more seeds running)

output.summary: Fuses Triton/CUTLASS MLP kernels, Hessian-guided int5/int6 quant, and a 3.5× MLP expansion while trimming artifact size to recover throughput and add capacity.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels
Hessian-based mixed int5/int6 allocation to fit wider MLP
Brotli-11 compression with memmap GPU-prefetch pipeline
